requirements.title: Mission Control must show operator acceptance evidence without raw JSON reading.
requirements.acceptance_boundary: operator-validation-audit public records include feedback summary and evidence refs, and Mission Control projects them into the viewer

forecast.estimated_token_cost_range: 0 additional implementation work items for v8.3 after final verification
forecast.forecast_boundary: Forecast is local runtime evidence and does not prove operator value or market truth.

not_proven: Requirement coverage proves bounded traceability only, not semantic satisfaction or market acceptance.
